final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing social media avatar for a content creator account focused on new energy vehicles, digital products, and lifestyle goods.

Style/medium: needs a clean, modern, universally approachable aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a square avatar format with a clear, centered focal element that reads well at small sizes
Subject: must include visual references to the three content pillars: new energy vehicles, digital/tech products, and lifestyle/everyday goods — balanced and harmonious as a single composition
Scene/backdrop: needs a neutral, platform-agnostic backdrop — exact background treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a fresh, friendly, and energetic atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant yet universally safe direction — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must avoid any symbols, gestures, colors, or imagery that carry negative or taboo connotations in any major culture or religion; must remain visually effective at both large and small display sizes across global social platforms
Avoid: must avoid political symbols, religious iconography, culturally sensitive hand gestures, and any single-culture-specific visual codes that may alienate international audiences
